topic.title: Topic
topic.description: The Kafka topic to use for this table

offset.description: The offset to start reading from. `group` is retained for compatibility but is not supported by the current rskafka-based implementation.

read_mode.title: read mode
read_mode.description: Controls whether the source will wait for messages to be committed; `read_committed` is retained for compatibility but is not supported by the current rskafka-based implementation.

group_id.title: group id
group_id.description: Legacy consumer group identifier retained for compatibility. Arroyo manages Kafka partition assignment and offsets itself with the current rskafka-based implementation.

group_id_prefix.title: group id prefix
group_id_prefix.description: Legacy consumer group prefix retained for compatibility. Arroyo manages Kafka partition assignment and offsets itself with the current rskafka-based implementation.

commit_mode.description: Committing behavior for Kafka Sink. `exactly_once` is retained for compatibility but is not supported by the current rskafka-based implementation; use `at_least_once`.

key_field.title: key field
key_field.description: Field to use to set the key of the message written to Kafka

timestamp_field.title: timestamp field
timestamp_field.description: Field to use to set the timestamp of the message written to Kafka; defaults to the event time

client_configs.title: Client Configs
client_configs.description: Additional Kafka configs to pass through when supported by Arroyo's rskafka-based client. See [Kafka Consumer Configs](https://kafka.apache.org/documentation/#consumerconfigs) and [Kafka Producer Configs](https://kafka.apache.org/documentation/#producerconfigs) for more details.

value_subject.title: Schema Registry value subject
value_subject.description: Set this to use a non-standard subject for this topic in Confluent Schema Registry (defaults to `{TOPIC}-value`)
